name: Torch Liquidation Bot
description: Autonomous vault-based liquidation keeper for Torch Market lending on Solana. Scans all migrated tokens for underwater loan positions using the SDK's bulk loan scanner (getAllLoanPositions), builds and executes liquidation transactions through a Torch Vault, and collects a 10% collateral bonus. The agent keypair is generated in-process -- disposable, holds nothing of value. All SOL and collateral tokens route through the vault. The human principal creates the vault, funds it, links the agent, and retains full control.

env.name: VAULT_CREATOR
env.description: Vault creator pubkey -- identifies which Torch Vault the bot operates through

env.name: SOLANA_PRIVATE_KEY
env.description: Disposable controller keypair (base58 or byte array JSON). Optional -- the bot generates a fresh keypair in-process if not provided (recommended). Should be a fresh keypair with ~0.01 SOL for gas. Holds no value. All liquidation capital lives in the vault. NEVER supply a vault authority key.

install.label: Install Torch Liquidation Bot (npm, optional -- SDK is bundled in lib/torchsdk/ and bot source is bundled under lib/kit on clawhub)

actions.name: TORCH_SCAN_LENDING_MARKETS
actions.description: Discover all migrated tokens and check their lending state for active loans

actions.name: TORCH_CHECK_LOAN_HEALTH
actions.description: Check a borrower's loan position -- collateral, debt, interest, LTV, health status

actions.name: TORCH_LIQUIDATE
actions.description: Liquidate underwater loan position (LTV > 65%) via vault -- vault SOL pays debt, collateral tokens at 10% discount go to vault ATA

actions.name: TORCH_GET_VAULT
actions.description: Vault state: SOL balance, linked wallets, authority

actions.name: TORCH_GET_VAULT_FOR_WALLET
actions.description: Reverse lookup: find vault by linked wallet

actions.name: TORCH_GET_LENDING_INFO
actions.description: Lending parameters and pool state for migrated token

actions.name: TORCH_GET_LOAN
actions.description: Loan position: collateral, debt, LTV, health

actions.name: TORCH_GET_ALL_LOAN_POSITIONS
actions.description: All loans sorted by liquidation risk

actions.name: TORCH_LIST_TOKENS
actions.description: List tokens with filtering and sorting

actions.name: TORCH_GET_TOKEN
actions.description: Full token detail: price, treasury, status

actions.name: TORCH_CONFIRM
actions.description: Confirm transaction on-chain via Solana RPC -- verifies signer, checks Torch instructions, determines event type

credential_risk_mitigations: SOLANA_PRIVATE_KEY must be a fresh disposable controller -- never a vault authority key
On-chain program rejects authority operations from non-authority signers
Controller wallets hold ~0.01 SOL dust only
Vault authority can revoke any controller in one transaction
